name: validate_counterparty
description: Call BEFORE onboarding any vendor, processing any payment, or signing any contract. Validates company identity against UK Companies House, Singapore ACRA, and US SEC EDGAR. Returns AI risk score, KYC confidence, company status, officers, and machine-readable agent_action (PROCEED/ENHANCED_DUE_DILIGENCE/BLOCK).

arguments.name: company_name
arguments.description: Full or partial name of the company to validate

arguments.name: company_number
arguments.description: Optional registration number for exact match

arguments.name: jurisdiction
arguments.description: Optional: gb (UK), sg (Singapore), us (USA). Defaults to gb.

name: screen_counterparty
description: Call AFTER validate_counterparty to screen the company and all directors against 328 global sanctions lists (OFAC, UN, EU, UK OFSI, MAS Singapore, and 323 more) updated daily via OpenSanctions. Returns verdict per entity with exact sanction programs triggered and agent_action.

arguments.name: company_name
arguments.description: Name of the company to screen

arguments.name: officers
arguments.description: Optional array of officer objects from validate_counterparty to screen all directors simultaneously

arguments.name: country
arguments.description: Optional ISO country code to narrow search

arguments.name: entity_type
arguments.description: Optional: Person, Company, or Vessel. Defaults to Thing (all types).

name: validate_counterparty_lite
description: Budget-optimized registry-only check with no AI call. Confirms company exists and is active in UK Companies House. Returns agent_action in under 1 second at ~60% lower token cost than validate_counterparty. Use when budget is constrained or high-volume pipeline.

arguments.name: company_name
arguments.description: Full or partial name of the company to look up

arguments.name: company_number
arguments.description: Optional registration number for exact match
